about.whatIsTitle: What Is the Love Frequency Test?
about.whatIsDesc: The love frequency test reveals your unique romantic vibration based on solfeggio frequencies. Answer 10 questions about your approach to love and relationships to discover which of 7 solfeggio frequencies matches your love energy. Each frequency carries a distinct meaning, from grounding love (396Hz) to spiritual connection (963Hz). Listen to your frequency and explore compatibility.
about.whatIs1: 7 solfeggio frequencies representing different love styles
about.whatIs2: 10 questions about your romantic preferences and emotional style
about.whatIs3: Music playback to hear your actual love frequency
about.frequenciesDesc: Solfeggio frequencies are ancient sound vibrations believed to promote healing and spiritual growth. In the context of love, each frequency resonates with a different aspect of romantic connection. The famous 528Hz is known as the love frequency, associated with healing and deep emotional bonds.
about.freq2: 528Hz: The love frequency, healing, deep bonds
